=================================== FAILURES ===================================
___________________ test_yaml_transcoder_preserves_unicode _____________________

    def test_yaml_transcoder_preserves_unicode():
        adapter = YamlTranscoder()
        envelope = ContentEnvelope(content="name: Zoë\nage: 30\n", content_type=ContentType.YAML)
        result = adapter.compress(envelope)
>       assert "Zoë" in result.content
E       AssertionError: assert 'Zoë' in '{"age": 30, "name": "Zo\\u00eb"}'

tests/unit/adapters/compression/test_yaml_transcoder.py:48: AssertionError
___________________ test_yaml_transcoder_handles_nested_keys ___________________

    def test_yaml_transcoder_handles_nested_keys():
        adapter = YamlTranscoder()
        envelope = ContentEnvelope(
            content="parent:\n  child:\n    key: value\n",
            content_type=ContentType.YAML,
        )
        result = adapter.compress(envelope)
>       assert "parent.child.key" in result.content
E       KeyError: 'parent.child.key'

tests/unit/adapters/compression/test_yaml_transcoder.py:73: KeyError: 'parent.child.key'

------------------------------ Captured log call -------------------------------
WARNING  token_sieve.adapters.compression.yaml_transcoder:yaml_transcoder.py:142 Could not flatten nested key path
